title: thymus praeflorens
intro: Thymus praeflorens is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Thymus praeflorens or Wild marjoram. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thymus praeflorens include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Thymus praeflorens is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
